title: MBS core.forward block
description: Forwarding primitive in three flavors: quoted, attested, certified. Per §7a.3.

flavor.description: §7a.3.1 quoted | §7a.3.2 attested | §7a.3.3 certified. Attested requires original had forwardable != 'no' and != 'quoted_only'. Certified requires forwardable = 'qualified_only' AND original tier = QUALIFIED AND forwarder is legal-person-capable.

quoted_content.description: For flavor=quoted: the forwarder's MBS blocks embedding the original text. For flavor=attested or certified: NOT required; original envelope is carried in attested_envelope_ref.

attested_envelope_ref.description: For flavor=attested or certified: inline or URL reference to the original envelope and its ProofEnvelope, preserving verifiable chain.

forward_chain.description: Ordered hop list for attested or certified forwards. Each entry is a prior forwarder DID. Clients MAY refuse chains longer than 8 hops (§7a.3.2).

forwarder_note.description: Optional note from the forwarder to the recipient.
